meta.purpose: Frontend verification checklist for public-safe product draft pages before deployment.
meta.current_blocker: The current Codex execution environment has Node.js but no npm, pnpm, yarn, corepack or local node_modules. Full TypeScript, Vite and prerender verification requires installing project dependencies first.

blocker_details: npm command was not found in PATH.
bundled Codex Node runtime does not include npm, TypeScript or Vite.

routes_to_verify.expected_behavior: Lists all Markdown product pages from src/content/products/*.md.

static_code_checks_completed.check: Product list and detail routes are registered
SSR prerender route list includes products

static_code_checks_completed.evidence: src/entry-server.tsx returns product title and description for /products/:id.

static_code_checks_completed.check: Footer links to first public-safe product drafts
static_code_checks_completed.evidence: src/components/Footer.tsx links to IEG-100, IEIO-100 and IER-100.

build_checks_to_run_after_dependencies.purpose: Build client, SSR bundle, prerender static routes and server bundle.

build_checks_to_run_after_dependencies.command: GitHub Actions step: Verify prerendered product pages
build_checks_to_run_after_dependencies.purpose: Fail deployment if product list/detail HTML files are missing from dist.
Start local server for browser verification.

manual_browser_checks: Open /products and confirm all 5 public-safe drafts appear.
Open each product detail page and confirm Markdown tables render correctly.
Confirm validation warning appears on every product detail page.
Confirm navigation active state works for /products and /products/:id.
View page source or built HTML and confirm product titles and meta descriptions are present after prerender.
claim_safety_checks: No combined 4G + WiFi + LoRa wireless uplink claims.
No WiFi range or certification claim.
No LTE band or carrier claim.
No LoRa range or exact frequency claim.
No OPC UA, BACnet or CAN claim on baseline gateway pages.
next_actions: Let GitHub Actions run npm ci, npm run lint and npm run build.
Use the deploy workflow's Verify prerendered product pages step to block bad releases.
Verify generated product prerender outputs in the GitHub Actions logs.
Use browser verification on /products and each product detail route.
Only after verification, deploy through the existing GitHub Actions workflow.
